name: hidemylogs
summary: **Surgical \*nix log cleaner** - selectively erase access records from lastlog, wtmp, btmp, and utmp while preserving file metadata.

documentation.readme: Surgical \nix log cleaner - selectively erase access records from lastlog, wtmp, btmp, and utmp while preserving file metadata.
usage_sections: print - Read and display records from utmp, wtmp, btmp, and lastlog
wipe - Remove records matching a username, IP, or time range filter
forge - Overwrite a lastlog record with a fake timestamp, terminal, and host
Remote log forwarding (rsyslog, syslog-ng) is the only reliable defense
File integrity monitoring (AIDE, Tripwire) detects modifications to log files

arguments.name: --and
arguments.description: All filters must match (default: any matches)

arguments.name: -s
arguments.description: Sources to display: u/w/b/l or any combination [default: uwbl]

arguments.name: --sources
arguments.description: Sources to display: u/w/b/l or any combination [default: uwbl]

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

function_signatures.name: configure
function_signatures.description: Configure the tool with runtime options (interface, target, etc.) before execution.

function_signatures.name: scan
function_signatures.description: Perform a read-only scan / probe of the target.

function_signatures.name: exploit
function_signatures.description: Run the offensive step against the target. Returns ok, data, error envelope.

function_signatures.name: report
function_signatures.description: Render the result into a human-readable or machine-readable report.

function_signatures.name: validate
function_signatures.description: Pre-flight check: confirm the target is reachable and the tool can run.

function_signatures.name: cleanup
function_signatures.description: Remove any artifacts left behind by the tool (pcaps, sessions, files).

function_signatures.name: chain
function_signatures.description: Take a previous tool's result and feed it as input to this tool.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/franckferman/hidemylogs.git. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cargo build --release`. Further invocations from upstream: `python3 scripts/generate_samples.py`; `./hidemylogs print \`. Surgical \nix log cleaner - selectively erase access records from lastlog, wtmp, btmp, and utmp while preserving file metadata.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [shell_linux] in the Penetration Testing category. Fits when the engagement needs: **Surgical \*nix log cleaner** - selectively erase access records from lastlog, wtmp, btmp, and utmp while preserving file metadata.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Surgical \nix log cleaner - selectively erase access records from lastlog, wtmp, btmp, and utmp while preserving file metadata.
